articles.title: England top group - but they will not win World Cup unless they improve
articles.description: England did their job topping the group - but they can forget winning the World Cup if they do not improve, writes Phil McNulty.

articles.title: 'Every person saved is a miracle': Families call to trapped loved ones in region devastated by Venezuela quakes
articles.description: Families keep vigil at buildings where they fear their loved ones are trapped, but face an impossible task to move heavy debris.

articles.title: Harry reconsiders bringing Meghan and children on UK trip
articles.description: It comes after his request for police protection was rejected days before the family is due to arrive.

articles.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
articles.description: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.
